title: Harness Adapter Profile Schema
description: Schema for defining adapter profiles that wrap host-native CLI capabilities into Kyberion contracts.

adapter_id.description: Unique identifier for this adapter (e.g., gh-issue-list-adapter)

provider.description: The external provider or tool (e.g., github-cli, jq, claude-cli)

surface_kind.description: The capability class as defined in the Harness Coordination Model

capability_id.description: The specific capability being wrapped (e.g., issue_list, code_search)

contract_kind.description: The Kyberion ADF contract type this adapter exposes (e.g., pipeline, capability-input)

observation_kind.description: Format of the output observation (e.g., json, plain_text, markdown)

result_kind.description: Expected shape of the final result context

approval_behavior.description: Whether this capability requires explicit human approval before execution

replayability.description: Classification of how safe this adapter is to replay automatically

fallback_contract.description: Optional: Path to a fallback ADF contract if this native capability fails
